videos.title: Air Supply - Making Love Out of Nothing at All (Sub. Español + Lyrics)
videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição I know just how to whisper and I know just how to cry. I know just where to find the answers. And I know just how to lie. I know just how to fake it. And I know just how to scheme. I know just when to face the truth. And then I know just when to dream. And I know just where to touch you. And I know just what to prove. I know when to pull you closer. And I know when to let you loose. And I know the night is fading. And I know the time's going to fly. And I'm never going to tell you everything I got. And I know I got to give it a try. And I know the roads to riches. And I know the ways to pay. I know how to lose them and I know how to break them. And I always know the name of the game. But I don't know how to leave you. And I'll never let you fall. And I don't know how you do it. Make a love out of nothing at all. Out of nothing at all. out of nothing at all. How nothing at all at all. I'm nothing at all. Heat. Heat. Heat. My heart is a pro. Heat. Heat. Heat. Heat. Heat. Heat. Heat. And I can make you every promise that has ever been made. And I can make all your demons be. But I'm never going to make it without you. Do you really want to see me grow? And I'm never going to make it like you do. Making love out of nothing at all. Out of nothing at all. I'm nothing at all. Heat. Heat. Heat. Heat. Heat up here. Yeah. Heat.

videos.title: Elton John, Rod Stewart, Phil Collins, Bee Gees, Lionel Richie | Soft Rock Love Songs 70s 80s 90s
videos.description:
Elton John, Rod Stewart, Phil Collins, Bee Gees, Lionel Richie | Soft Rock Love Songs 70s 80s 90s

📍 Drift Away from the Noise. Step into the Heart of Soft Rock.
🌇 Welcome to Soft Rock Radio — where melodies heal and memories linger.

💫 Whether you’re driving under the sunset or winding down at night, our handpicked mix of classic Soft Rock hits will bring back the golden days — featuring the unforgettable sounds of Elton John, Rod Stewart, Chicago, Air Supply, and more.

🍃 Each note tells a story, each lyric touches the soul. Feel the warmth of nostalgia and the comfort of timeless rhythms that never fade.

🌙 This is more than music — it’s a mood, a memory, a moment of calm. Let the sound of guitars and gentle drums carry you away.

🌻 Subscribe and join the Soft Rock Radio community — where every beat feels like home. 🎧
   / @softrockradio523  

#softrock #softrocklovesongs #softrockmusic

🎸 Soft Rock 70s 80s 90s – Timeless Melodies for Your Soul
Welcome to Music For Forever 🎶
Enjoy the golden era of Soft Rock with legendary voices like Lionel Richie, Elton John, Bee Gees, Phil Collins, America, Journey, and more.
Let these classic hits bring you back to the most romantic, emotional, and unforgettable decades in music history.
✨ Perfect for relaxing, working, driving, or simply reminiscing good old memories.
🎧 Sit back, close your eyes, and feel the magic of timeless soft rock.
